_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Payment Card Industry (PCI) data security standards and best practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of sector-specific data regulations and their interaction with general data protection law, including HIPAA (healthcare), GLBA and SOX (financial services), FERPA (education), and PCI DSS (payment card industry).
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Knowledge RC-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-002 (RC, cosine: 0.514), SP-K-002 (SP, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.636). Shared vocabulary: [card, data, industry, knowledge, payment, pci]. NICE-only terms [best, practices, security, standards] vs WIDAI-only terms [dss, education, ferpa, financial, general, glba] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.889, R=0.824). P exceeds R by 0.065 — the NICE element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of Payment Card Industry (PCI) data security standards and best practi" and "Knowledge of sector-specific data regulations and their interaction with general" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.612 ≈ STS 0.636 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [card, data, industry, knowledge, payment] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 25.8%. Shared tokens: [card, data, industry, knowledge, payment, pci]. NICE-only: [best, practices, security, standards]. WIDAI-only: [dss, education, ferpa, financial, general, glba].
